nodes.label: Issue: Facebook Adapter Fragility
nodes.description: Facebook actively blocks automation. Adapter requires periodic maintenance. Consider email notification fallback from Facebook Groups.

nodes.label: Issue: CSS Selector Validation
nodes.description: All Playwright-based adapters have initial CSS selectors that need validation against live sites via smoke_test_live.py.

nodes.label: Issue: JS-Heavy Specialist Adapters
nodes.description: BMotor (HU), MaleDucati (HU), and some PrestaShop adapters return empty results due to AJAX/client-side search. May need longer timeouts or explicit JS interaction.

nodes.label: Issue: Specialist Adapter Selector Validation
nodes.description: DucStore, MotorradteileHannover, French/Spanish PrestaShop, UK WooCommerce returned EMPTY on first smoke test.

nodes.label: Issue: Shipping Estimate Refinement
nodes.description: Current shipping estimates are rough ranges. Could improve with actual carrier APIs (DHL, DPD, etc.).

nodes.label: Issue: eBay Additional Image Extraction
nodes.description: Currently only extracts primary listing image. Browse API supports additional images.

nodes.label: Issue: MotoBreakers Adapter Disabled
nodes.description: Disabled, needs separate research on site structure and scraping approach.

nodes.label: Issue: DucatiParts.cz Domain Redirect
nodes.description: ducatiparts.cz redirects to eshop.krejbichmeccanica.cz. Adapter updated but needs monitoring.

nodes.label: Completed: 23 Specialist Ducati Adapters
nodes.description: Breakers and Ducati-only shops across IT (5), DE (4), FR (4), ES (3), UK (4), HU (2), CZ (1). 183 unit tests passing.

nodes.label: Completed: Currency Rate Caching
nodes.description: ECB rates cached for 24 hours in-memory via CurrencyConverter._rates_fetched_at.

nodes.label: Completed: OEM Part Number Database Expansion
nodes.description: Seed catalog expanded from 17 to 34 parts with enduro-specific and shared parts.

nodes.label: Completed: Search Pipeline Data Flow
nodes.description: Currency conversion wired into orchestrator, multi-language query expansion (30 terms, 12 languages), bilingual relevance filter, parallel adapter execution with per-adapter timeout.

nodes.label: Completed: Adapter Resource Cleanup
nodes.description: Playwright browser processes cleaned up via try/finally in CLI after search completes.

nodes.label: Multi-Language Query Expansion
nodes.description: 30 terms across 12 languages for search query expansion.

nodes.label: smoke_test_live.py
nodes.description: Live smoke test script to detect CSS selector rot across Playwright-based adapters.
